reviews.review_description:
Now I have to admit that Ruffnauts gets fun at times. But there are various issues that this pitiful dev team ignores.
A-I generated slop content:
The signs are all AI generated. 
It's very sloppy, and the laziness oozes out of every model.
Stolen animations, monsters, ideas and models:
Everything is stolen from unity or other games. Many players have this issue aswell.
One buggy abomination:
Just recently I was unable to type, sell, level up pets, or even store loot. All in one. I hatched a chicken egg as an experiment, and I could hatch it, but my pet didn't even register. 
But of course, Vinci studios or whatever they're called won't listen, they never do.

reviews.review_description: So it was a normal day. I was scrolling the meta quest store, and this game popped up, and I decided to check it out, and it was good for the most part. It was pretty good for about 5-6 days, then it got boring, so I stopped playing it. But then I saw the game updated for Halloween, so I launched the game to see what all this was about. I started playing the game again, and it was fun for a while, then they removed the Halloween stuff. Then I stopped until the Christmas update, then it was TRASH. There was NOTHING except crapy cosmetics. so I tried out pet duping, and that was fun. Then they patched that out of the game, so i stopped playing. Okay, now here's some stupid stuff I found out while playing. So the official ruffnauts YouTube channel steals videos from other people making videos on the game, which is very scummy. Also, they never update the same stupid micro-transactions since NOVEMBER. Speaking of micro transactions, the things you have to pay for are gambling. You have a five or so a chance to get a really specific colour, which costs five bucks WHO IS PAY FOR THIS. Well, I know five years olds thats mostly all the people who play this game, that's why there are so many crapy micro-transactions that small children buy those things that are where the real money is at. But I do think this game could improve when they finally release ruffnauts 2.0. I feel it will suck but it will suck less than the game does now, and hopefully, they get rid of the crapy micro-transactions. But i do think this whole genre of games that i call "pet games" are the most overused games in vr and most full of slop (except ug that game has real passion put into it) so that doesn't do this game any favors.
